description: Recognize and preserve a language attribute on code_block (pre>code).

tests.description: Single language class round-trips through parse and serialize
Multi-class (hljs then language-xxx) parses language, re-serializes as single class
tests.comment: Parse-only case: toDOM only ever emits the single language-xxx class, so the hljs token does not survive serialization.

tests.description: Multi-class, reversed token order (language-xxx then hljs) parses language, re-serializes as single class
tests.comment: Parse-only case: token order in the source class list must not matter.

tests.description: No language class means no language attribute and no stray class
